dialog.stepLabel: Jiyan: "The Suspended Ruins are ahead of us...."

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Suspended Ruins are ahead of us.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Resonance Beacon here is still functioning, and the defense feature is intact too. We can catch our breath here.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Ovathrax assault has been as brutal as expected. We've been cut off from our main forces.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: It's the three of us against them all from here.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Master Jianxin... I hope she is okay...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I tried to contact her and our base, but nothing came back. The Threnodian's power is possibly interfering with Terminal signals.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: We have no choice but to trust them now. Let's press on.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: We're bound to face a vicious fight.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: We've reached the Suspended Ruins. We'll get going once you're ready.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The road ahead is completely blocked off.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: You choose where the Disruptor's last blast hits. Make it count, Rover.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: May it cleave out a path for us.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: This amount of enemies... We cannot fire the Disruptor again...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Yangyang, you...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: The Threnodian is only going to summon more of them as we go. We need someone to keep them away and escort the others into the statue.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: I understand you're planning to do it yourself, General, but I think I am better suited for this task.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: We all want to beat the Threnodian once and for all.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: I understand you don't want to leave anyone behind. But we all know you and Rover have the best chance against that monster.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Now that our shared goal is within hand's reach, I... I do not want to let it slip away.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: ...Indeed, Yangyang. Turns out I was the one being indecisive.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Now, Rover...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: I've witnessed the faith and fortitude of so many on our way here. It’s time I fulfill their trust.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Rover, please leave it to me. I'll have your back.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Now, Rover...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Please make the call.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: I will stand guard here. The Threnodian will not be able to draw more power from the monsters.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: I'll leave the rest to you.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: It seems the culprit is hidden deep within this statue.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: This will be our final battle with the Threnodian. Rover, are you ready?

options.text: Ready to kick some Threnodian arse!
I'd be lying to say I'm not nervous.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: That's the spirit.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Indeed. We've come too far to turn back now.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Yes, so many have put their faith in us.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Being nervous is not necessarily detrimental; sometimes it helps you focus. Take a deep breath, and then...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Let's bring an end to this war, once and for all.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Master Jianxin!

items.speaker: Jianxin
items.text: There's too many of them. Someone must stay behind to keep them at bay.

items.speaker: Jianxin
items.text: Everyone, let's part our ways here.

items.speaker: Jianxin
items.text: Carry on with your mission. You can leave the rest to me.
